name: indian-law-compliance
description: Audits a codebase/application against Indian laws and regulations — DPDP Act, IT Act, CERT-In, RBI, accessibility, sector rules, and business compliance. Hybrid engine: deterministic detectors + AI reasoning. NOT legal advice.
author: opensource

skills.name: india-compliance-audit
skills.description: Full hybrid compliance audit of a project against applicable Indian laws. Run via /india-audit.

commands.name: india-audit
commands.description: Run an Indian-law compliance audit. Usage: /india-audit [area] — area is optional (dpdp | cert-in | rbi | accessibility | health | ecommerce | aadhaar | all).

commands.name: india-checklist
commands.description: Interactive Q&A checklist for non-code compliance items (GST, grievance officer, DPO, registrations, insurance).
